settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.autoJoinDescription: Automatically add users matching this email pattern to the organization.
settings.autoJoinFullDescription: Users whose email matches this pattern will automatically join this organization when they register or sign in via OAuth.
settings.autoJoinHelp: Leave empty to disable auto-join. Example: @example\.com$ matches all @example.com emails.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Manage organization invitations.
invitations.sendDescription: Send an invitation to join this organization
invitations.pendingDescription: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet
